label: NON-PRODUCTION conformance spike

correctness.name: fixed_sql_corpus_and_returning
correctness.detail: corpus v1 (e3252ab25165741e49b6e811fb6cbd2bacd33208133022a099087a1353ef33c8) matched columns, storage types, values, row order, schema, triggers, transactions, UPSERT/REPLACE/multi-row, and RETURNING

correctness.name: file_interoperability_both_directions
correctness.detail: candidate-created and reference-created files were each opened and mutated by the other engine with exact ordered rows/values preserved; both passed integrity_check

correctness.name: wal_reopen_recovery
correctness.detail: read uncheckpointed reference WAL, reopened after recovery/checkpoint, and reopened candidate WAL database

correctness.name: snapshot_and_backup_artifacts
correctness.detail: candidate serialize artifact (8192 bytes) passed reference integrity_check; reference online backup matched when opened by candidate

correctness.name: session_changeset_normalize_cross_apply
correctness.detail: candidate generated 108 bytes; normalized 3 changes equal reference; candidate changeset applied to rusqlite and rusqlite changeset applied to candidate

correctness.name: subprocess_hard_deadline_recovery
correctness.detail: candidate stayed process-confined; parent killed long-query child at 200 ms, explicitly deleted and verified absence of its DB/sidecars, and the next candidate case returned 42

policy_and_cancellation.name: deterministic_progress_handler
policy_and_cancellation.detail: graphitesql 0.1.3 exports no progress-handler API; instruction-budget cancellation cannot be installed

policy_and_cancellation.name: interrupt_handle
policy_and_cancellation.detail: graphitesql 0.1.3 exports no interrupt handle API; hard deadlines require process termination

policy_and_cancellation.name: complete_explain_opcode_policy
policy_and_cancellation.detail: representative join EXPLAIN is incomplete: not yet implemented: EXPLAIN: VDBE join programs not yet listed

policy_and_cancellation.name: trusted_schema
policy_and_cancellation.detail: PRAGMA trusted_schema did not observably change after `PRAGMA trusted_schema=OFF`

benchmark_methodology.engine_order: alternating each sample; each engine runs first three times
benchmark_methodology.observable_work: equal SQL shape; query results fully materialized and checksummed; write affected-row counts checksummed
benchmark_methodology.statistic: median of six samples (mean of middle pair) with min/max spread

hard_stop_criteria: hard stop if any correctness or policy/cancellation check is not PASS; benchmark data never overrides correctness or missing controls
